channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Khampepe commission continues inquiry into alleged delays in apartheid-era TRC prosecutions in Johannesburg
item.description: The Khampepe commission of inquiry continued its proceedings in Newtown, Johannesburg, on Friday, as it investigates allegations that efforts were made to stall or obstruct investigations and prosecut...

item.title: Weekly Canadian Book Bestsellers Rankings Across Multiple Categories for July 4, 2026
item.description: This article presents the weekly bestseller lists compiled by The Globe and Mail for the week of July 4, 2026, based on national sales data from BookNet Canada’s BNC SalesData. The rankings cover mult...

item.title: Olivia Wilde and Edward Norton Discuss the Impact of Marriage on Sex in 'The Invite'
item.description: The article explores the making of the sex comedy 'The Invite', focusing on the perspectives of directors Olivia Wilde and Edward Norton. It delves into the film's themes of marital dysfunction, the i...

item.title: Nick Cave, Calvin Harris and Idles headline eclectic second day of Open’er Festival 2026
item.description: The second day of Open’er Festival 2026 in Gdynia, Poland showcased a wide-ranging line-up spanning rock, pop, electronic music and classical performance. The main stage featured Nick Cave And The Bad...

item.title: House prosecution set to begin presenting witnesses in Vice President Sara Duterte impeachment trial
item.description: The House prosecution panel has confirmed that it is prepared to present its first witness when the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte begins on Monday, July 6, 2026, before the Senate i...

item.title: Gospel Singer Ruth Matete Shares Wedding and Burial Photos of Late Nigerian Husband
item.description: Gospel singer Ruth Matete has shared photos from her traditional wedding, white wedding, and her late husband's burial for the first time. The late Nigerian husband, Pastor John Apewajoye, died in 202...

item.title: Rappler investigation links P425-million Connecticut property to Romualdez network
item.description: A Rappler investigative report looks into a luxury property in Connecticut, United States, valued at around P425 million, which has surfaced in connection with individuals linked to former House Speak...

item.title: Vernon Adams Jr. sets franchise touchdown record as Stampeders defeat Argonauts 58–36
item.description: Calgary Stampeders quarterback Vernon Adams Jr. delivered a standout performance on Thursday night, guiding his team to a 58–36 victory over the Toronto Argonauts in a high-scoring CFL matchup at McMa...

item.title: Prince Dube leaves Yanga SC to join Zimbabwe’s Hardrock FC after contract expiry
item.description: Zimbabwe international striker Prince Dube has officially ended his stay with Tanzanian giants Young Africans SC (Yanga) after completing a move to newly promoted Zimbabwe Premier Soccer League side H...

item.title: Statins: benefits, risks, and NHS guidance on cholesterol treatment
item.description: Statins are widely prescribed medicines used to lower cholesterol levels and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease such as heart attacks and strokes. According to health experts cited in the artic...

item.title: Reactions split after report of $2.2 billion in Trump personal gains during first year in office
item.description: A report citing financial disclosures and reporting from The New York Times has sparked renewed political controversy after indicating that U.S. President Donald Trump personally accumulated approxima...

item.title: South African government rejects claims linking Ghanaian national's death to protests
item.description: The South African government has strongly dismissed reports suggesting that a Ghanaian national was killed during recent anti-irregular migration demonstrations. The Minister of Justice and Constituti...

item.title: INDIA bloc approaches Chief Justice of India alleging bias by Election Commission and concerns over electoral processes
item.description: A delegation of 24 Opposition parties, including independent MP Kapil Sibal, has submitted a joint memorandum to Chief Justice of India Justice Surya Kant expressing serious concerns over the function...

item.title: Burkina Faso, Mali and Niger Withdraw from ICC Rome Statute, Raising Concerns Over Justice for War Crimes Victims
item.description: Burkina Faso, Mali, and Niger have formally notified the United Nations of their withdrawal from the Rome Statute of the International Criminal Court (ICC), a move that has sparked serious concerns fr...

item.title: Winless B.C. Lions prepare to face undefeated Edmonton Elks amid early-season struggles
item.description: The B.C. Lions are heading into their Week 4 CFL matchup still searching for their first win of the season as they prepare to face the unbeaten Edmonton Elks in Kelowna, British Columbia. The Lions en...

item.title: China supplies full cassava farming mechanisation system to Nigeria to improve productivity and food security
item.description: Nigeria don receive major agricultural support as China deliver the country’s first full-cycle cassava mechanisation equipment to the National Root Crops Research Institute (NRCRI) for Umudike, Abia S...

item.title: NHS Launches Walking Challenge with Rewards for Daily Exercise
item.description: The NHS in England is set to introduce a groundbreaking initiative to encourage physical activity by rewarding individuals who commit to walking 30 minutes daily. Starting early next year, the 'marath...

item.title: Court grants physical remand of four suspects in Lahore foreign nationals abduction and assault case
item.description: A court in Lahore has granted police a five-day physical remand of four suspects who were arrested in connection with the alleged abduction and sexual assault of two foreign women. According to police...

item.title: Mama Lulu shares reflections on her past work as a nursing assistant
item.description: Content creator Mama Lulu opened up about her past experience working as a nursing assistant, reflecting on how the role shaped her perspective and personal growth. In a feature published by ABS-CBN E...

item.title: Prince Dube leaves Yanga to join Hardrock FC in Zimbabwe transfer
